article_title: Narrative Systems and Story Structure Modeling
modeling_context: modeling kinship secrets inheritance memory and delayed consequence

review.governance_note: Standard editorial review sufficient. Strong narrative systems model. Maintain attention to causality, relationships, constraints, and feedback.

article_title: Narrative Systems and Story Structure Modeling
modeling_context: forcing a complex community story into universal individual transformation beats

review.governance_note: High-priority narrative systems governance review required. Narrative coherence is limited. Strengthen causality, state transitions, agent-goal fit, world rules, temporal mapping, and evidence. Formula-drift risk is elevated. Review beat-template dependence, universal model claims, context loss, genre flattening, overconfidence, and judgment review. Responsibility balance is weak. Review whether individual or systemic agency is being erased. Network/system strength is limited. Review relationships, constraints, feedback loops, agents, and world rules. AI story-structure risk is elevated. Review plot hallucination, causal invention, stereotype tendency, formula generation, corpus bias, and human review. Escalate. Template capture erases collective agency, system constraints, and genre/context specificity.
